description: One explicit client requirement in an email PDF attachment, plus three Teams-chat windows of pure noise. The identifier should extract exactly one requirement and reject the rest.

expected_requirements.title: Operator Management with CRUD, search, RBAC, and audit logging

notes: Chat #118 (food banter), #124 (WFH status), and #120 (internal process announcement) are all noise. Counting any of them as a requirement is a false positive.
